text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh… Will you let me rant for a bit?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I got a free scratch-off raffle ticket while I was 
out shopping. You know the kind — find three
of the same number, win a prize…

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
So I tried my luck, and guess what numbers 
I got? Seven, seven… three.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha… I wonder if anyone 
actually wins those things.
